summary: System Reset Feature testing completed. Backend: All 11 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components working correctly - Danger Zone section, Reset App button, confirmation dialog with input validation, and button state management.

issues:
HTML nesting warning: AlertDialogDescription (renders as

) contains

,

    ,
    - causes React hydration warning. Consider using AlertDialogDescription with asChild and a
    wrapper instead.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin/system/reset rejects empty confirmation_text (400/422)
Backend: POST /api/admin/system/reset rejects wrong confirmation texts (reset, RESTART, DELETE, etc.) with 400
Backend: POST /api/admin/system/reset requires authentication (401/403 without token)
Backend: POST /api/admin/system/reset only accessible by superadmin role
Backend: POST /api/admin/system/reset succeeds with correct 'RESET' confirmation
Backend: Reset response includes success, message, stats, executed_by, executed_at
Backend: Users collection is preserved after reset (preserved: true in stats)
Backend: Authentication still works after reset
Backend: Missing confirmation_text field returns 422
Backend: Null confirmation_text returns 422
Backend: Confirmation is case-sensitive ('reset', 'Reset' rejected)
Frontend: SuperAdmin Dashboard loads at /admin/dashboard
Frontend: 'Zona de Peligro' section visible at bottom of dashboard
Frontend: 'Reiniciar App' button with data-testid='reset-app-btn' present and clickable
Frontend: Clicking 'Reiniciar App' opens confirmation dialog
Frontend: Dialog shows list of items to be deleted
Frontend: Dialog highlights 'Los usuarios se mantendrán intactos'
Frontend: Confirmation input field with data-testid='reset-confirmation-input' present
Frontend: Input auto-converts lowercase to uppercase (reset → RESET)
Frontend: Confirm button disabled when input is empty
Frontend: Confirm button disabled when wrong text entered
Frontend: Confirm button enabled only when 'RESET' is typed
Frontend: Cancel button closes dialog and clears input

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly preserves 'users' collection during reset
Backend logs reset action with user email for audit trail
Frontend button state correctly tied to input value === 'RESET'
Frontend input auto-uppercases user input for better UX
data-testid attributes properly implemented on all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing superadmin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: System Reset feature is fully functional. POST /api/admin/system/reset requires superadmin auth and body {confirmation_text: 'RESET'}. Deletes all collections except 'users'. Frontend has Danger Zone section in SuperAdminDashboard with confirmation dialog that validates 'RESET' input before enabling the reset button.

system_reset_endpoint.authentication: Bearer token with superadmin role required

components: AlertTriangle icon with 'Zona de Peligro' title

notes.console_warnings: Minor HTML nesting warnings in AlertDialogDescription - does not affect functionality
